name: ACP_TERMINAL_DEFAULT_OUTPUT_BYTE_LIMIT
rationale: Bounded SDK-side retention, registry, or capture limit; expose through client configuration if operators need to tune it.

name: CLOSED_SHELL_EXIT_CODE_RETENTION_LIMIT
rationale: Bounded SDK-side retention, registry, or capture limit; expose through client configuration if operators need to tune it.

name: CRON_JOB_LIMIT
rationale: Bounded SDK-side retention, registry, or capture limit; expose through client configuration if operators need to tune it.

name: VM_FETCH_BUFFER_LIMIT_BYTES
rationale: vm.fetch() HTTP response body cap; must stay <= negotiated frame budget.

name: EXEC_OUTPUT_CAPTURE_LIMIT_BYTES
rationale: Bounded SDK-side retention, registry, or capture limit; expose through client configuration if operators need to tune it.

name: OBSERVED_PROCESS_TIME_LIMIT
rationale: Bounded SDK-side retention, registry, or capture limit; expose through client configuration if operators need to tune it.

name: PROCESS_REGISTRY_LIMIT
rationale: Bounded SDK-side retention, registry, or capture limit; expose through client configuration if operators need to tune it.

name: PROCESS_STREAM_CAPACITY
rationale: Bounded SDK fan-out channel capacity used for flow control; not a sidecar VM resource policy.

name: ACP_TERMINAL_LIMIT
rationale: Bounded SDK-side retention, registry, or capture limit; expose through client configuration if operators need to tune it.

name: SHELL_DATA_CHANNEL_CAPACITY
rationale: Bounded SDK fan-out channel capacity used for flow control; not a sidecar VM resource policy.

name: SHARED_SIDECAR_POOL_LIMIT
rationale: Bounded SDK-side retention, registry, or capture limit; expose through client configuration if operators need to tune it.

name: MAX_BENCHMARK_ITERATIONS
rationale: Dev benchmarking harness only.

name: MAX_BENCHMARK_WARMUP_ITERATIONS
rationale: Dev benchmarking harness only.

name: DEFAULT_NODE_IMPORT_CACHE_MATERIALIZE_TIMEOUT_MS
rationale: Execution-layer Node import-cache materialization fallback; normal VM executions receive the wired sidecar value.

name: DEFAULT_V8_CPU_TIME_LIMIT_MS
rationale: Execution-layer active JavaScript CPU-time fallback; normal VM executions receive the wired sidecar value.

name: DEFAULT_V8_WALL_CLOCK_LIMIT_MS
rationale: Execution-layer JavaScript wall-clock fallback; zero keeps it disabled unless the wired VM limit overrides it.

name: JAVASCRIPT_CAPTURED_OUTPUT_LIMIT_BYTES
rationale: Guest JS stdout/stderr capture cap.

name: JAVASCRIPT_EVENT_CHANNEL_CAPACITY
rationale: Channel shape required by the sync-RPC protocol; flow control, not policy.

name: JAVASCRIPT_EVENT_PAYLOAD_LIMIT_BYTES
rationale: Per-event payload cap for the JS event channel.

name: KERNEL_STDIN_BUFFER_LIMIT_BYTES
rationale: Guest stdin buffering cap.

name: MAX_TIMER_ACTIONS_PER_TURN
rationale: Bounded timer work quantum per JavaScript pump turn to preserve fairness.

name: MAX_TIMER_DELAY_MS
rationale: Clamps a guest timer delay to the JS setTimeout ceiling (2^31-1 ms); a leak guard so a timer thread cannot outlive its session by pinning the session Arc, mirroring the standard setTimeout max rather than operator policy.

name: MAX_TIMERS_PER_EXECUTION
rationale: Fallback for the configured per-execution JavaScript timer limit.

name: NODE_SYNC_RPC_RESPONSE_QUEUE_CAPACITY
rationale: Channel shape required by the sync-RPC protocol; flow control, not policy.

name: DEFAULT_NODE_IMPORT_CACHE_MATERIALIZE_TIMEOUT
rationale: Standalone import-cache materialization fallback; normal VM executions use VmLimits.js_runtime.import_cache_materialize_timeout_ms.

name: DEFAULT_PYTHON_EXECUTION_TIMEOUT_MS
rationale: Python runtime execution timeout.

name: DEFAULT_PYTHON_MAX_OLD_SPACE_MB
rationale: Python host JS old-space heap sizing; engine-side default for the wired limit.

name: DEFAULT_PYTHON_OUTPUT_BUFFER_MAX_BYTES
rationale: Python output buffer cap; env knob already exists.

name: DEFAULT_PYTHON_VFS_RPC_TIMEOUT_MS
rationale: Python VFS RPC timeout.

name: MAX_FRAME_SIZE
rationale: V8 IPC frame size; single value feeds BOTH codec sides.

name: DEFAULT_WASM_PREWARM_TIMEOUT_MS
rationale: WASM prewarm compile-cache timeout.

name: DEFAULT_WASM_RUNNER_HEAP_LIMIT_MB
rationale: Wasm runner V8 heap default (2 GiB, intentionally above the 128 MiB per-guest budget so warmup stops OOMing); normal VM executions use VmLimits.wasm.runner_heap_limit_mb.

name: MAX_SYNC_WASM_PREWARM_MODULE_BYTES
rationale: Prewarm compile-cache heuristic bound; not guest-visible behavior.

name: MAX_WASM_IMPORT_SECTION_ENTRIES
rationale: Parser DoS hardening mandated by crates/CLAUDE.md invariant 6.

name: MAX_WASM_MEMORY_SECTION_ENTRIES
rationale: Parser DoS hardening mandated by crates/CLAUDE.md invariant 6.

name: MAX_WASM_MODULE_FILE_BYTES
rationale: Guards module load size.

name: MAX_WASM_VARUINT_BYTES
rationale: Parser DoS hardening mandated by crates/CLAUDE.md invariant 6.

name: WASM_CAPTURED_OUTPUT_LIMIT_BYTES
rationale: WASM stdout/stderr capture cap.

name: WASM_MODULE_BYTES_CACHE_CAPACITY
rationale: Host-side LRU entry cap for cached wasm module bytes; process-wide cache sizing, not per-VM policy.

name: WASM_SYNC_READ_LIMIT_BYTES
rationale: WASM sync read cap; also templated into the JS runner shim.

name: DEFAULT_STREAM_DEVICE_READ_BYTES
rationale: Internal device read chunk size; perf detail, not a guest bound.

name: MAX_FDS_PER_PROCESS
rationale: FD table layout fixed at 0-255; max_open_fds is the policy knob above it.

name: DEFAULT_MAX_RECORD_LOCKS
rationale: Standalone/test fallback only; production derives the record-lock bound from the policy-wired VmLimits.resources.max_open_fds.

name: SHEBANG_LINE_MAX_BYTES
rationale: Shebang parse guard; matches Linux BINPRM_BUF_SIZE-style bound, parser-safety.

name: MAX_EXEC_INTERPRETER_DEPTH
rationale: Linux BINPRM_MAX_RECURSION compatibility limit for nested executable interpreters.

name: MAX_UNIX_SOCKET_SYMLINKS
rationale: Linux ELOOP compatibility limit for Unix-socket path resolution.

name: MAX_PIPE_BUFFER_BYTES
rationale: Linux default pipe capacity; guest-visible POSIX semantics, not policy.

name: MAX_ALLOCATED_PID
rationale: POSIX PID value space.

name: MAX_SIGNAL
rationale: Linux signal number space.

name: MAX_CANON
rationale: POSIX MAX_CANON line-discipline constant.

name: MAX_PTY_BUFFER_BYTES
rationale: Mirrors Linux PTY buffer semantics.

name: DEFAULT_BLOCKING_READ_TIMEOUT_MS
rationale: Kernel resource policy surface.

name: DEFAULT_MAX_CONNECTIONS
rationale: Kernel resource policy surface.

rationale: Kernel resource policy surface.

name: DEFAULT_MAX_READDIR_ENTRIES

name: DEFAULT_MAX_RECURSIVE_FS_DEPTH
rationale: Default for the configured recursive filesystem operation bound.

name: DEFAULT_MAX_RECURSIVE_FS_ENTRIES
rationale: Default for the configured recursive filesystem operation bound.

name: DEFAULT_MAX_SOCKET_BUFFERED_BYTES

rationale: Kernel resource policy surface.

name: DEFAULT_MAX_SOCKETS

name: DEFAULT_MAX_WASM_MEMORY_BYTES

name: BROWSER_MAX_FRAME_BYTES
rationale: Browser transport frame cap; fixed host transport limit until browser config exposes it.

name: DEFAULT_READ_MAX_BYTES
rationale: Fallback guest network read cap when the request omits max bytes; wire to request/config if tuning is needed.

name: MAX_POLL_WAIT_MS
rationale: Guest network poll wait clamp; internal scheduling guard.

name: DEFAULT_READ_MAX_BYTES
rationale: Fallback guest PTY read cap when the request omits max bytes; wire to request/config if tuning is needed.

name: MAX_PTY_READ_WAIT_MS
rationale: Guest PTY read wait clamp; internal scheduling guard.

name: MAX_VM_LAYERS
rationale: Layer count cap is operator-meaningful but coupled to layer RPC validation tests; wire later.

name: DEFAULT_ACP_MAX_COMPLETED_MESSAGE_BYTES
rationale: Maximum serialized bytes retained while completing one ACP message.

name: DEFAULT_ACP_MAX_FALLBACK_CONTINUATION_BYTES
rationale: Maximum recent durable history included in an ACP fallback continuation preamble.

name: DEFAULT_ACP_MAX_HISTORY_PAGE_ENTRIES
rationale: Maximum number of durable ACP history entries returned in one page.

name: DEFAULT_ACP_MAX_PENDING_PERMISSIONS_PER_SESSION
rationale: Maximum actionable ACP permission requests retained for one durable session.

rationale: Maximum actionable ACP permission requests retained across one VM.

rationale: Binding registration capacity policy.

name: VM_FETCH_BUFFER_LIMIT_BYTES
rationale: vm.fetch() HTTP response body cap; must stay <= negotiated frame budget.

name: DEFAULT_KERNEL_STDIN_READ_MAX_BYTES
rationale: Internal stdin pump chunking; not a guest-visible bound.

name: DEFAULT_KERNEL_STDIN_READ_TIMEOUT_MS
rationale: Internal stdin pump poll interval; not a guest-visible bound.

name: LINUX_GUEST_FD_LIMIT
rationale: Linux RLIMIT_NOFILE ceiling used to reject descriptor numbers that cannot exist in a Linux guest.

name: MAX_SHEBANG_REDIRECTS
rationale: Linux interpreter-recursion compatibility limit for JavaScript child-process shebang redirects.

name: EXITED_PROCESS_SNAPSHOT_RETENTION
rationale: Bounded exited-process snapshot ring for wait/inspect bookkeeping.

name: JAVASCRIPT_NET_POLL_MAX_WAIT
rationale: net.poll sync-RPC wait ceiling; protects the main sync-RPC thread.

name: MAX_READDIR_ENTRIES_PER_CALL
rationale: Internal bridge-response batch granularity; total directory entries remain governed by VmLimits.resources.max_readdir_entries.

name: LINUX_MAX_INTERPRETER_DEPTH
rationale: Linux BINPRM_MAX_RECURSION compatibility limit for host-launch interpreter resolution.

name: MAX_JAVASCRIPT_COMMAND_REDIRECT_DEPTH
rationale: Command-resolution recursion guard (symlink/shim chains); safety invariant.

name: MAX_SHEBANG_LINE_BYTES
rationale: Linux BINPRM_BUF_SIZE-style compatibility bound for JavaScript child-process shebang parsing.

name: MAX_PER_PROCESS_STATE_HANDLES
rationale: Crypto/state handle table cap tunable in principle; low demand, wire later.

name: PYTHON_SOCKET_MAX_RECV
rationale: Guest Python socket recv request clamp for one synchronous host read; bounded by default, fold into Python/socket VmLimits if operators need to tune it.

name: SQLITE_JS_SAFE_INTEGER_MAX
rationale: JS Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER boundary for SQLite integer coercion, not a tunable bound.

name: UDP_MAX_DATAGRAM_BYTES
rationale: UDP payload ceiling imposed by datagram protocol semantics; buffering remains separately policy-bounded.

name: MAX_CROSS_DEVICE_MOVE_DEPTH
rationale: Host filesystem safety bound; expose through typed filesystem policy if operators need to tune it.

name: MAX_MAPPED_TRUNCATE_BYTES
rationale: Host filesystem safety bound; expose through typed filesystem policy if operators need to tune it.

name: MAX_AGENTOS_PACKAGE_MOUNTS
rationale: Per-VM cap on granular /opt/agentos leaf mounts; not yet wired to VmLimits.

name: DEFAULT_METADATA_CACHE_ENTRIES
rationale: In-memory chunk metadata cache size; performance detail, not guest policy.

rationale: Default for the configured process-wide protocol queue bound.

rationale: Default for the configured process-wide protocol queue bound.

name: DEFAULT_PROTOCOL_MAX_OUTBOUND_REQUESTS
rationale: Default for the configured process-wide protocol queue bound.

name: DEFAULT_PROTOCOL_MAX_PENDING_RESPONSE_BYTES
rationale: Default for the configured process-wide protocol queue bound.

name: DEFAULT_PROTOCOL_MAX_PENDING_RESPONSES
rationale: Default for the configured process-wide protocol queue bound.

name: DEFAULT_PROTOCOL_MAX_PROCESS_EVENTS
rationale: Default for the configured process-wide protocol queue bound.

name: DEFAULT_VM_EXECUTOR_TEARDOWN_TIMEOUT_MS
rationale: Default for the configured process-wide runtime admission or lifecycle bound.

name: MAX_FALLBACK_MESSAGE_BYTES
rationale: Bounded stderr fallback message size prevents telemetry failure amplification.

name: CONTROL_FRAME_QUEUE_CAPACITY
rationale: Internal backpressure channel capacity.

name: EVENT_CHANNEL_CAPACITY
rationale: Internal backpressure channel capacity.

name: PENDING_REQUEST_LIMIT
rationale: Internal pending-request ring; fails loudly when exceeded.

name: REQUEST_FRAME_QUEUE_CAPACITY
rationale: Internal backpressure channel capacity.

name: DEFAULT_COMPLETED_RESPONSE_CAP
rationale: Internal dedupe/backpressure ring; loud-fail bounded buffer.

name: DEFAULT_MAX_FRAME_BYTES
rationale: Wire frame cap; sidecar-scoped, exposed via NativeSidecarConfig and negotiated to clients.

name: DEFAULT_MAX_FRAME_BYTES
rationale: Wire frame-size cap constant in its owning wire module; protocol-level frame invariant, not a per-VM policy limit.

name: DEFAULT_BRIDGE_RESPONSE_MAX_BYTES
rationale: Per-method bridge response declaration fallback; aggregate response bytes are separately policy-bounded.

name: MAX_CBOR_BRIDGE_CONTAINER_ITEMS
rationale: Codec amplification hardening; parser-safety.

name: MAX_CBOR_BRIDGE_DEPTH
rationale: Codec recursion hardening; parser-safety.

name: MAX_PENDING_PROMISES
rationale: Runtime self-protection cap with typed error code; sized for safety, loud on overflow.

name: MAX_VM_CONTEXTS
rationale: Runtime self-protection cap with typed error code; sized for safety, loud on overflow.

name: TEST_SESSION_OUTPUT_CHANNEL_CAPACITY
rationale: Test-only session output channel capacity.

name: MAX_CJS_NAMED_EXPORTS
rationale: Module resolver parser/amplification hardening; sized as safety ceiling, not a tuning knob.

name: MAX_CJS_RUNTIME_EXPORT_NAME_LEN
rationale: Module resolver parser/amplification hardening; sized as safety ceiling, not a tuning knob.

name: MAX_MODULE_BATCH_RESOLVE_RESPONSE_BYTES
rationale: Module resolver parser/amplification hardening; sized as safety ceiling, not a tuning knob.

name: MAX_MODULE_PREFETCH_BATCH_SIZE
rationale: Module resolver parser/amplification hardening; sized as safety ceiling, not a tuning knob.

name: MAX_MODULE_PREFETCH_GRAPH_MODULES
rationale: Module resolver parser/amplification hardening; sized as safety ceiling, not a tuning knob.

name: MAX_MODULE_RESOLVE_CACHE_ENTRIES
rationale: Module resolver parser/amplification hardening; sized as safety ceiling, not a tuning knob.

name: MAX_MODULE_RESOLVE_MODULES
rationale: Module resolver parser/amplification hardening; sized as safety ceiling, not a tuning knob.

name: MAX_PENDING_BRIDGE_CALLS
rationale: Fallback bridge-call waiter registry bound; sidecar VM paths inject the configured reactor limit.

name: MAX_FRAME_SIZE
rationale: Pair of execution/v8_ipc.rs; feeds the same V8 IPC frame field.

name: DEFAULT_HEAP_LIMIT_MB
rationale: Engine-side default for the wired V8 isolate heap limit (128 MiB, Cloudflare-matching); operator-raisable via the configured jsRuntime heap limit.

name: MAX_UNHANDLED_PROMISE_REJECTIONS
rationale: Bounded diagnostic accumulation with typed error.

name: NEAR_HEAP_LIMIT_HEADROOM_BYTES
rationale: Internal V8 near-heap-limit OOM-guard headroom; runtime self-protection mechanism, not an operator bound.

name: MAX_PROCESS_WARM_WORKERS
rationale: Hard process ceiling for warm V8 workers above the operator-selected desired worker count.

name: MAX_SNAPSHOT_BLOB_BYTES
rationale: Build-time artifact sanity guard on first-party assets, not guest input.

name: MAX_V8_BRIDGE_CODE_BYTES
rationale: Build-time artifact sanity guard on first-party assets, not guest input.

name: MAX_V8_USERLAND_CODE_BYTES
rationale: Sanity bound on the client-configured agent-SDK userland snapshot bundle; trusted-config artifact guard, not guest input.

name: MAX_PATH
rationale: Linux PATH_MAX mirror for engine-backed VFS paths.

name: MAX_SYMLINK_DEPTH
rationale: Linux ELOOP resolution limit for engine-backed VFS paths.

name: MAX_PACK_INDEX_ENTRIES
rationale: Pack-time mirror of the bounded load-side package index invariant.

name: MAX_REALPATH_SYMLINKS
rationale: ELOOP bound for cross-mount symlink resolution in realpath.

name: MAX_SNAPSHOT_DEPTH
rationale: Recursion guard against cyclic/abusive layer chains; parser-safety.

name: MAX_TAR_CACHE_ARCHIVES
rationale: Bounded, refcounted digest-keyed archive mmap cache; evicts with a warning.

name: MAX_TAR_INDEX_ENTRIES
rationale: Caps a malformed tar's member count so the in-memory index cannot exhaust host memory.

name: MAX_TAR_SYMLINKS
rationale: ELOOP bound for symlink resolution within a single tar archive.

name: DEFAULT_MAX_FILESYSTEM_BYTES
rationale: Kernel resource policy surface.

name: DEFAULT_MAX_INODE_COUNT
rationale: Kernel resource policy surface.

name: MAX_PATH_LENGTH
rationale: Linux PATH_MAX; changing it diverges from Linux.

name: MAX_SYMLINK_DEPTH
rationale: Linux ELOOP resolution limit.

name: CLOSED_SHELL_ID_RETENTION_LIMIT
rationale: Bounded TypeScript client retention set; expose through client configuration if operators need to tune it.

name: DEFAULT_LIVE_FILESYSTEM_SYNC_MAX_BYTES
rationale: Default byte bound for copying a live compatibility filesystem into the sidecar-backed filesystem.

name: TRAILING_OUTPUT_DRAIN_MAX_MS
rationale: Teardown drain heuristic, not a guest-visible bound.

name: DEFAULT_WAIT_TIMEOUT_MS
rationale: Test harness wait timeout only.

name: DEFAULT_LIMIT
rationale: Default page size used when a caller omits limit; the configured ACP page maximum remains authoritative.

name: MAX_SAFE_SEQUENCE
rationale: JavaScript safe-integer boundary for durable session sequence interoperability.

name: DEFAULT_CONNECT_TIMEOUT
rationale: Actor UDS transport connect timeout; expose through transport configuration if tuning is needed.

name: DEFAULT_REQUEST_TIMEOUT
rationale: Actor UDS request timeout; expose through transport configuration if tuning is needed.

name: MAX_FRAME_BYTES
rationale: Actor UDS framing protocol bound shared with the actor endpoint.

name: DEFAULT_PYTHON_MANAGED_HOST_FILE_LIMIT
rationale: Bounded fallback for standalone Python execution; VM launches use configured kernel fd limits.

name: DEFAULT_MAX_METADATA_BYTES
rationale: Default actor-SQLite VFS metadata budget, overridable in the plugin descriptor.

name: DEFAULT_METADATA_CACHE_ENTRIES
rationale: Default actor-SQLite VFS metadata cache capacity, overridable in the plugin descriptor.

name: MAX_CHUNK_SIZE
rationale: Actor-SQLite VFS storage-format chunk-size ceiling.

name: MAX_METADATA_BYTES
rationale: Hard ceiling for the plugin-configured actor-SQLite VFS metadata budget.

name: MAX_METADATA_CACHE_ENTRIES
rationale: Hard ceiling for the plugin-configured actor-SQLite VFS metadata cache.

name: DEFAULT_MAX_SOCKET_READINESS_SUBSCRIBERS
rationale: Default socket readiness subscriber bound; wire through typed VM networking limits.

name: DEFAULT_BRIDGE_CALL_TIMEOUT
rationale: V8 host-call fallback timeout; expose through runtime configuration if tuning is needed.

name: MAX_SYMLINK_DEPTH
rationale: Linux ELOOP mirror of the kernel invariant.

name: NET_BRIDGE_MAX_RAW_WRITE_BYTES
rationale: Internal socket bridge flush granularity preserving configured backpressure.

name: MAX_BINDING_DESCRIPTION_LENGTH
rationale: Cross-boundary contract with native-sidecar-core bindings validation; both sides must change together.
